audit_items.proof_trace: The property holds because reference counting is the sole free mechanism: `decrRefCount` frees only when `refcount == 1` and panics on `refcount <= 0` (preventing double-free). In `tryObjectEncoding`, both `decrRefCount(o)` calls (L454, L474) are immediately followed by `return` with no subsequent access to the freed pointer; the EMBSTR path copies `s` into `emb` before `decrRefCount` frees it. All callers reassign via `argv[n] = tryObjectEncoding(argv[n])`, eliminating any stale references.
